summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Horizon Sports Facility Operating System MVP. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all 19 endpoints working correctly. Frontend core functionality works across all user roles with proper authentication, dashboards, booking flows, and matchmaking features.

ui_bugs.issue: Bottom navigation not clearly accessible or clickable on mobile viewport

integration_issues.issue: Venue cards sometimes not detected in tests despite being visible

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, features, CTA buttons
Auth - Login with all demo credentials (player/owner/coach roles)
Role-based routing - players go to /player, owners to /owner, coaches to /coach
Player Dashboard - shows stats, upcoming bookings, quick actions
Venue Discovery - shows venues, search/filter works
Venue Detail - shows venue info, calendar, time slots with prices
Booking Flow - select slot, choose payment mode, confirm booking
Matchmaking - shows matches, can create new matches
Venue Owner Dashboard - shows venues, tabs for bookings/pricing/analytics
Coach Dashboard - shows academy, student management
Profile page - shows user stats, edit profile functionality
Backend APIs - All 19 API endpoints working (100% success rate)
JWT Authentication - Token-based auth with role verification
Split Payments - MOCKED Razorpay payment processing works
Dynamic Pricing - Pricing rules system functional
Demo Data - 4 venues, 3 users, pricing rules, matches seeded correctly
Dark Theme - Midnight Stadium theme implemented
action_item_for_main_agent: Improve mobile navigation accessibility - ensure bottom navigation is clearly visible and clickable on mobile viewports. Consider adding mobile navigation indicators or improving touch targets.
